## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature / enhancement
- [ ] Research finding / protocol update
- [ ] Documentation update

## Testing

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is based on `master`
- [ ] Commit messages follow `type: description` convention (e.g. `fix: correct CRC seed`)
- [ ] TypeScript builds cleanly (`npm run build`)
- [ ] No debug `console.log` left in production code paths
- [ ] `RESEARCH.md` updated if this reflects a new RE finding
- [ ] `symbols.json` updated if new canonical names were introduced
- [ ] This PR is ready for review (not a draft)
